name: Herbed Summer Vegetables
recipeIngredient: -- loosely packed (e.g., oregano, basil, and chives)
-- trimmed, cut vertically into 1/4 inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
Mince the mixed fresh herbs. In a small bowl, crumble the feta cheese and drizzle with 2 tablespoons olive oil. Stir in the minced herbs until well combined. Set aside.
Heat the remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil in a wok or large heavy skillet over medium-high heat. When hot but not smoking, add the squash slices and cook, stirring constantly, for 3 to 4 minutes until they begin to soften.
Add the green beans; toss to mix. Cook, stirring constantly, for 3 to 5 minutes until the beans are bright green and crisp-tender.
Add the tomatoes; continue cooking, stirring constantly, for another 4 to 5 minutes until the squash is translucent and the tomatoes have softened.
Season with a pinch of salt and a generous amount of pepper. Remove from heat.
Mince the fresh dill and stir it into the vegetables so that it is evenly distributed.
Transfer the vegetables to a warmed serving platter, sprinkle the crumbled feta cheese on top, and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings.
